name: YouTube Transcript
description: Service/API for transcribing and summarizing audio and video content.

auth_methods.note: Docs state requests must include an Authorization header with your API key: Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>.

credential_access.note: Pricing and signup pages show a Free tier and indicate you can sign up to receive an API key and view it in the dashboard.

api_surface.note: Docs show a REST base URL (https://api.transcriptapi.com) and endpoints such as POST /v1/transcriptions, GET /v1/transcriptions/{id}, POST /v1/summaries; SDKs (Node, Python) are also mentioned.

buildability.note: Public REST docs plus self-serve signup and a free API key are available, so a developer can obtain credentials and call the API immediately.
